title: Feather Nametag Icon
description: Feather Icon for Offline Nametag Icon Mod (Feather Client)
body:
# Feather Client Nametag Icon (for Offline Nametag Icon Mod)

This resource pack is made for use with the **Offline Nametag Icon** mod and adds the **Feather Client** logo as a nametag icon above players' heads. It's a subtle cosmetic addition for fans of Feather Client who want to represent it in their Minecraft world.

## Featured in Video:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/FSowG7DfPok" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>  

## Features
- Feather Client logo above player nametag
- Designed for use with the [Offline Nametag Icon](https://modrinth.com/mod/offline-nametag-icon) mod
- Minimal and performance-friendly design

> **Note:** I do **not** own the Feather Client logo. All rights to the Feather logo and branding belong to **Feather Client** and their respective owners. This pack is purely fan-made and for personal or community use only.
